posts.raw_content:
REPORTER: "What basis can you provide?  Do you have documents or other things like that— that you can show us?”

MASSIE ACCUSER CYNTHIA WEST:  “I do.  And I can show it.  And— I should tell people— I just got back from the dentist.  So this side of my face is numb.  I did not have a stroke, people!  Haw ha!   

No, I just got an email from The House legal team, because they provide you with free representation and, um, in that— you know— I’m going to talk to them tomorrow because, you know, because there’s a breech of Settlement Agreement, obviously, because I’m walking-away from the $60,000 [severance offer from Rep. Victoria Spartz (R-Indiana) for firing West] and so, in that, I will talk to them about that because I do have documentation.  Like, okay, now that I’ve breeched the Settlement Agreement— am I— I’m just— 

I had a lawyer review that interview, right?, to make sure there wasn’t any defamation. To make sure I’m not doing anything that’s going to get me hurt in the long run. Because I do want to do the right thing, but I don’t want to do it at significant cost. So, IF that’s something that I can make available, then that’s something that will be happening in the future.”

REPORTER: "Ok.  Awesome!  So, moving on— "

https://youtu.be/vWT0lH1ZAtE?si=lLVHicrOOWNpZYBM&t=259

- -

(congratulations, reporter Christopher "Ok Awesome" Saul.   With Follow-up Question skillz like that— you’ve got a bright future in the Fake News industry!)
